'''nawubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whalehead|whalehead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whalehead|whalehead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nawubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næwibith|næwibith]] || [[word:næwibij|næwibij]] || [[word:næwibish|næwibish]] || [[word:næwibi|næwibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawuwubuth|nawuwubuth]] || [[word:nawuwubuj|nawuwubuj]] || [[word:nawuwubush|nawuwubush]] || [[word:nawuwubu|nawuwubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawubuth|nawubuth]] || [[word:nawubuj|nawubuj]] || [[word:nawubush|nawubush]] || [[word:nawubu|nawubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawufbuth|nawufbuth]] || [[word:nawufbuj|nawufbuj]] || [[word:nawufbush|nawufbush]] || [[word:nawufbuf|nawufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nawubuthu|nawubuthu]] || [[word:nawubuju|nawubuju]] || [[word:nawubushu|nawubushu]] || [[word:nawubuku|nawubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nawubuth|nawubuth]] || [[word:nawubuj|nawubuj]] || [[word:nawubush|nawubush]] || [[word:nawubu|nawubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nawubuthul|nawubuthul]] || [[word:nawubujul|nawubujul]] || [[word:nawubushul|nawubushul]] || [[word:nawubukul|nawubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nawubuthuthu|nawubuthuthu]] || [[word:nawubujuju|nawubujuju]] || [[word:nawubushushu|nawubushushu]] || [[word:nawubuku|nawubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nawubuthun|nawubuthun]] || [[word:nawubujun|nawubujun]] || [[word:nawubushun|nawubushun]] || [[word:nawubukun|nawubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nawubuthuoro|nawubuthuoro]] || [[word:nawubujuoro|nawubujuoro]] || [[word:nawubushuoro|nawubushuoro]] || [[word:nawubukuoro|nawubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
